rationale: Legal name of the Maine entity whose clerk/RA address is being updated. Single-line widget at the top-left of page 0 (rect [40.5, 564.7, 285.8, 582.7]).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the clerk/registered agent as it appears on the record in the Secretary of State's office:
rationale: Existing clerk/RA name on record — used to identify which RA record is being updated. Reuses CORP_CLKRA-3's clerk_change.current_clerk_or_agent_name.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The old address of the clerk/registered agent as it appears on the record in the Secretary of State's office: (street, city, state and zip code - old address)
rationale: Single-line old address (street + city + state + zip combined). New schema-gap key in the established clerk_change.* namespace — CORP_CLKRA-3 didn't capture old address because the entity-initiated form identifies the existing record by name only.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The new address of the clerk/registered agent: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: New physical-location address (no P.O. Box). New key — CORP_CLKRA-3 used clerk_change.new_noncommercial_physical_address because that form distinguishes commercial vs noncommercial RAs. RO-E911 does not qualify, so a generic clerk_change.new_physical_address is more appropriate (the existing clerk/RA may be either type).
Optional new mailing address. Parallel to clerk_change.new_physical_address — generic (not type-qualified).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: This change of address was duly authorized by (choose one): [ ] Town/Municipality
rationale: Town/Municipality 'checkbox' implemented as a tiny /Tx widget at rect [140.3, 202.5, 156.0, 215.2] (template anomaly — typically /Btn, here it is /Tx, filler types 'X' to mark selected). Enum value 'town_municipality'. Mutually exclusive with Text7.
U.S. Postal Service 'checkbox' implemented as a tiny /Tx widget at rect [360.0, 203.2, 375.8, 217.5]. Enum value 'us_postal_service'. Mutually exclusive with Text6.
Date of signature, on the bottom-left at rect [72.0, 154.2, 199.5, 176.2].
Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget for the municipal official or postmaster, at rect [317.3, 121.5, 578.3, 137.2]. Shape D. The (signature) line above is wet-ink only with no AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1. Should mirror entity.name.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees. Page-0 header says 'No Filing Fee', so base is $0; only expedite premium ($50 / $100 / $0) is charged when an expedite tier is selected.
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — typically left blank on RO-E911 since the filing is municipality- or USPS-initiated, not entity-initiated.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
